title: Creating Cookies Without the 'HttpOnly' Flag is Security-Sensitive
description: When a cookie is created without the 'HttpOnly' attribute, it can be vulnerable to XSS attacks, potentially allowing session-cookies to be stolen. This rule checks for such instances in Java code.
recommendation: Ensure the 'HttpOnly' attribute is set to true when creating cookies.

checks.message: Set the 'HttpOnly' flag to true when creating cookies
